name: cursor-auto-chat
description: Auto fill and submit cursor chat via local HTTP API

cursorAutoChat.port.description: The port for the local HTTP server

cursorAutoChat.target.description: auto: try Cursor Composer (Agent) first, then VS Code Chat; composer / chat: only that UI

cursorAutoChat.fallbackMacOsPaste.description: macOS only: activate Cursor and simulate Cmd+V for Lexical Composer. Requires System Settings → Privacy & Security → Accessibility (Cursor / Cursor Helper) and possibly Automation → allow Cursor to control System Events; quit Cursor fully after changing.

cursorAutoChat.preferAgentMode.description: When using Composer, try to switch to Agent mode (not Ask) via workbench.action.chat.toggleAgentMode before filling.
